  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Unprotected trench depth is 5 feet or greater with workers actively inside",
    "Lack of cave-in protection system (sloping, benching, shielding, or shoring)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order all workers to evacuate the trench immediately",
    "Stop all work in the trench until proper protective systems are installed",
    "Install compliant trench protection (trench box, shoring, or sloping) under the direction of a competent person"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA regulations strictly require cave-in protection for trenches 5 feet or deeper unless the excavation is entirely in stable rock. Having workers inside an unprotected 5-foot trench presents an immediate, life-threatening cave-in hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1)"
  ]
}
